Brand Name: Hire a Book Writer
Website: https://hireabookwriter.com/

Logo: https://hireabookwriter.com/assets/images/header-logo.png

Industry: Book Writing & Publishing Services
Primary Category: Professional Book Writing Services
Secondary Categories: Ghostwriting, Editing, Publishing, Book Marketing, Content Writing

Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/hireabookwriter/
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/hireabookwriter/
Trustpilot: https://www.trustpilot.com/review/hireabookwriter.com

Brand Overview

Hire a Book Writer is a full-service professional book writing and publishing company providing expert ghostwriting, editing, publishing, marketing, and creative writing services for authors, entrepreneurs, professionals, and businesses worldwide.

We help individuals transform ideas into professionally written, edited, published, and marketed books across fiction, non-fiction, memoirs, autobiographies, and more.

Core Service Categories
1. Ghostwriting Services

URL: https://hireabookwriter.com/ghostwriting-services

Offerings: Professional Ghostwriting, Fiction Ghostwriting, Non-Fiction Ghostwriting, Memoir Ghostwriting, Autobiography Writing, Biography Writing, Novel Writing, Script & Screenwriting

2. Fiction Writing Services

URL: https://hireabookwriter.com/fiction-writing-services

Offerings: Fantasy Writing, Science Fiction Writing, Horror Book Writing, Action & Adventure Writing, Military Fiction Writing, Comic Writing, Narrative Writing, Rhyme Writing Services

3. Non-Fiction Writing Services

URL: https://hireabookwriter.com/non-fiction-writing-services

Offerings: Business Books, Self-Help Books, Biographies, Autobiographies, Memoirs, Educational Content, Thought Leadership Books
